name: The Hammer and the Rose: A Behzat Ç. Story
original_name: Çekiç ve Gül: Bir Behzat Ç. Hikayesi
overview: The Hammer and the Rose: A Behzat Ç. Story is a Turkish-made detective, adventure, comedy, and action internet series inspired by the novel of the same name by Emrah Serbes, which will be published in 2022.
